option_line: 3:gaDHO_visitElekStart2:Ask where you could find the office of Cornelius Elek
original: gaDHO_visitElekStart2:Ask where you could find the office of Cornelius Elek

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntro2b:"They probably didn't make it. I'm sorry."
original: They probably didn't make it. I'm sorry.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntro2c:"If they're not back yet, they're probably dead."
original: If they're not back yet, they're probably dead.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntro4:"Yes. And it worked. It gave me coordinates for something in the Abyss."
original: Yes. And it worked. It gave me coordinates for something in the Abyss.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntro4:"Right. It worked. And gave me coordinates for something in the Abyss."
original: Right. It worked. And gave me coordinates for something in the Abyss.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntroPayment2a:"Fine. We can talk about MY discovery first. Then payment."
original: Fine. We can talk about MY discovery first. Then payment.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntroPayment2b:"MY discovery. And we'll talk about payment if you want any part in it."
original: MY discovery. And we'll talk about payment if you want any part in it.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltTransferData:Transferer les donnees recovered from the sensor array
original: Transferer les donnees recovered from the sensor array

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntroBusiness:"No, this is business. Your freelancer failed. Now I can do the job- if you pay."
original: No, this is business. Your freelancer failed. Now I can do the job- if you pay.

option_line: gaDHO_visitElekAltIntroPiracy:"Yes, it is. And if you don't pay me, you'll never get your precious data."
original: Yes, it is. And if you don't pay me, you'll never get your precious data.
